message:
fix(learn): use double dashes for bv robot flags

Changed `bv -robot-triage -recipe high-impact` to
`bv --robot-triage --recipe high-impact` to match
the documented syntax in AGENTS.md.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,7 +170,7 @@ const COMMANDS: CommandEntry[] = [
     name: "bv",
     fullName: "Beads Viewer",
     description: "Analyze the task DAG and pick work (robot protocol)",
-    example: "bv -robot-triage -recipe high-impact",
+    example: "bv --robot-triage --recipe high-impact",
     category: "stack",
     learnMoreHref: "/learn/tools/beads",
   },
